name: Unix Shell Reverse Shell Execution
description: Detects common Unix reverse shell patterns in process command lines
query:
// Detect reverse shell patterns on Unix/Linux systems
// Trigger on bash/sh with network redirection
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(bash\s+-i|/dev/tcp/|mkfifo|nc\s+-e|ncat\s+-e|python.*socket.*connect|perl.*socket.*INET)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 30 seconds
